# zabbix_media_type_webhook (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix webhook media type by `id` or `name`. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be provided.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Display name of the media type. One of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `attempt_interval` (String) Interval between delivery attempts.
- `description` (String) Description of the media type.
- `event_menu_name` (String) Label for the event menu entry.
- `event_menu_url` (String) URL for the event menu entry.
- `max_attempts` (Number) Maximum number of delivery attempts.
- `max_sessions` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent sessions.
- `message_templates` (Attributes List) Per-event-source notification templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--message_templates))
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Key/value pairs passed to the webhook script. Parameter values are always empty — the API does not return sensitive values. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))
- `process_tags` (Boolean) Whether to add event tags from webhook response.
- `script` (String) JavaScript body of the webhook.
- `show_event_menu` (Boolean) Whether to add a link to the event menu.
- `status` (String) Whether the media type is active: `enabled` or `disabled`.
- `timeout` (String) Script execution timeout.

<a id="nestedatt--message_templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `message_templates`

Read-Only:

- `eventsource` (Number) Event source type.
- `message` (String) Message body.
- `recovery` (Number) Recovery type.
- `subject` (String) Message subject.


<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Parameter name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Parameter value. Always empty — the API does not return sensitive values.
